sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94906" key="skio/prw|ron" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκῐό-πρῳρον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n94906.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tent</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">awning on the prow</tr_>, ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
